# PERF-227 positive: zlib.NewWriterLevel on hot path without pool
lang: go
file: PERF-227-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"bytes"
	"compress/zlib"
)

func CompressPage(page []byte) []byte {
	var buf bytes.Buffer
	w, err := zlib.NewWriterLevel(&buf, zlib.DefaultCompression)
	if err != nil {
		return nil
	}
	_, _ = w.Write(page)
	_ = w.Close()
	return buf.Bytes()
}
